name: agym-okf
description: The OKF record for agym.ai — the training catalog (schools, courses, benchmarks, environments). Edit knowledge/ + data-src/; CI compiles to dist/; agym.ai reads dist/ as the published overlay.

scripts.build: node scripts/build-okf.mjs && node scripts/build-config.mjs && node scripts/build-benchmarks.mjs && npm run sync
scripts.sync: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r public/okf public/config public/data dist/ && cp public/llms.txt dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
